allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['data'].get\('NAME','?'\), '|', f['data'].get\('FAILDATE','?'\), '|', f['data'].get\('SAVR','?'\), '|', f['data'].get\('ASSET','?'\)\) for f in d.get\('data',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import urllib.request, json; r=urllib.request.urlopen\('https://api.fdic.gov/banks/failures?limit=5&sort_by=FAILDATE&sort_order=DESC&output=json',timeout=10\); d=json.loads\(r.read\(\)\); [print\(f['data'].get\('NAME','?'\),'|',f['data'].get\('FAILDATE','?'\),'|',f['data'].get\('ASSET','?'\)\) for f in d.get\('data',[]\)]")
